name: Argentine Marinade
recipeInstructions:
An authentic Argentine asado or barbecue is enhanced by this flavorful marinade called chimichuri. It has a multi-spiced vinaigrette base with an earthy note from saffron. This marinade is ideal for poultry or shellfish, and can be brushed onto garlic bread before toasting.
Steep the saffron threads in lemon juice for 20 minutes. Whisk together all ingredients until well combined, then store in a covered jar.
From "Wild About Saffron: A Contemporary Guide to an Ancient Spice" by Ellen Szita. Published by Saffron Rose, 28 John Glenn Circle, Daly City, CA 94105. Posted by Stephen Ceideberg; March 30, 1993.
